source.notes: FY 2025-26 General Fund net revenue. Breakdown approximated from IFO Monthly Revenue Update categories and FY 2024-25 actuals (proportions are highly stable year over year). Verify exact dollars against latest IFO publication before any public launch.

sources.label: Personal Income Tax
sources.shortDescription: PA's flat 3.07% tax on wages and most income — paid by working Pennsylvanians and retirees with taxable income

sources.label: Sales and Use Tax
sources.shortDescription: 6% on most retail purchases (with exemptions for groceries, clothing, and prescriptions)

sources.label: Corporate Net Income Tax
sources.shortDescription: Tax on corporate profits — rate is being phased down to 4.99% by 2031

sources.label: Other Taxes
sources.shortDescription: Cigarette, liquor, gross receipts, inheritance, realty transfer, and other tax revenues

sources.label: Non-Tax Revenue
sources.shortDescription: Licenses, fees, fines, treasury investment earnings
